data.title: Coinsilium Group Subsidiary Forza Raises $3.8 Million for Bitcoin Investment
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Coinsilium Group's subsidiary, Forza, has successfully raised approximately $3. 8 million through the issuance of 15,486,111 new ordinary shares, each with a nominal value of zero. The shares were priced at £0. 18 each. The funds will be utilized to increase the company's holdings in Bitcoin.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/26435593318001?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Asian stocks rise, EU futures up while dollar hits 3-Year low ahead of U.S. jobs data
data.description:

Overnight in New York, major indexes hit fresh highs according to Reuters. This happened after Trump announced a trade pact with Vietnam. The agreement calls for a 20% U. S. […]

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,600 USDT with a 6.59% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 03, 2025, 06:28 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,600 USDT, with a narrowed 6.59% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Stablecoins are a new fiscal weapon that may bring trillions of dollars of liquidity support to Bitcoin in the future
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes recently wrote that the U.S. Treasury Department's support for the issuance of stablecoins by large banks in TBTF is one of its key policies to deal with huge fiscal deficits and national debt pressures. He believes that this will release up to $6.8 trillion in purchasing power for short-term Treasury bonds (T-bills) and drive financial markets up.
At the same time, if the Fed stops paying interest on bank reserves (IORB), it will also release an additional $3.3 trillion in funds into the Treasury market. Arthur Hayes said that although this policy combination is not quantitative easing (QE) in the traditional sense, it will have the same upward momentum for fixed supply assets such as Bitcoin.
He predicts that after the passage of Trump's spending bill and the increase in the debt ceiling, the U.S. Treasury will issue bonds to supplement the Treasury Account (TGA), which may suppress market liquidity in the short term, and Bitcoin may consolidate around $100,000, with a pullback low of $90,000 to $95,000. But after liquidity is restored in early September, a new round of increases will begin.
Arthur Hayes concluded that the real stablecoin narrative does not lie in FinTech companies, but in the "financial weaponization innovation" of TBTF banks using stablecoins to reconstruct compliance, costs, and the purchasing power of treasury bonds. He advised investors to "go long on Bitcoin and JPMorgan Chase" and embrace this new liquidity cycle led by the Treasury.

data.title: Perena Secures New Funding with Over 350 Supporters
data.description:
According to PANews, decentralized stablecoin infrastructure project Perena has announced the completion of a new funding round, attracting over 350 supporters. This round saw participation from institutions such as Susquehanna, Native CryptoX, and Hermeneutic Investments.

Previously, Perena, a Solana-based stablecoin trading infrastructure project, completed a $3 million pre-seed funding round led by Borderless Capital.

data.title: Binance Offers Up to 12.3% APR on XUSD Flexible Products
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced a new promotion for XUSD Simple Earn Flexible Products, offering users the opportunity to earn up to 12.3% APR. The promotion is set to run from 2025-07-04 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-07-17 23:59 (UTC). Users can subscribe to these products on a first-come, first-served basis, with rewards distributed daily. The Bonus Tiered APR will be credited to users' Spot Accounts the day after accrual begins, while Real-Time APR rewards will accumulate in Earn Accounts every minute.

The promotion features different APR rates based on subscription amounts. For subscriptions up to 300 XUSD, users can earn a total of 12.3% APR, which includes a 12% Bonus Tiered APR and approximately 0.3% Real-Time APR. For amounts between 300 and 3,000 XUSD, the APR is 2.3%, and for amounts exceeding 3,000 XUSD, the APR is 0.3%. The minimum subscription limit is set at 0.1 XUSD, with a maximum limit of 300,000 XUSD per user.

Users interested in participating can purchase XUSD through various payment methods, including Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and SWIFT Bank Transfer, exclusive to corporate users. Once acquired, users can deposit XUSD into their Binance account and subscribe to the XUSD Simple Earn Flexible Products to start earning rewards. It is important to note that the Real-Time APR is subject to change and will be updated on the product page. After the promotion period, only Real-Time APR rewards will continue. Binance reserves the right to modify or cancel the promotion at its discretion.

data.title: Sidekick and Orbiter Finance now integrate OKX DEX API
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Sidekick and Orbiter Finance have now integrated OKX DEX API, allowing users to enjoy the seamless trading process, low slippage, better quotes and deep liquidity provided by OKX DEX, and comprehensively improve the efficiency and user experience of on-chain transactions.
It is reported that the goal of OKX DEX API is to become the developer's first choice and industry standard by providing industry-leading API solutions, while promoting the expansion and diversification of the OKX DEX aggregator ecosystem. Sidekick is a one-stop live trading platform where anyone can share real-time market insights and trade digital assets instantly. Orbiter Finance is a decentralized cross-chain bridge application that provides low-cost and almost instant cross-chain assets and is one of the infrastructures of Ethereum Layer2.

data.title: IMF Rejects Pakistan’s Energy Plan for Bitcoin Mining – What Does This Mean for Its Crypto Ambitions?

data.title: GMGN launches video version of revenue chart function, supports generating MP4 format within 10 seconds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: GMGN announced that its custom profit chart function has undergone a major update and now supports the generation of profit charts in MP4 video format of no more than 10 seconds.

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) Launches Invest and This You? Tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) launched Solana ecosystem's MEME tokens invest and This You?. Users can start trading in the on-chain trading section.

Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: Wallets suspected to be related to Matrixport have withdrawn more than 30,000 ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @lookonchain monitoring, wallet addresses suspected to be related to Matrixport have withdrawn a total of 30,734 ETH from Binance and OKX in the past 24 hours, with a total value of approximately US$78 million at current prices.
